Title: Banded crunch
Desc: Lie on your back, anchor the band overhead, and crunch by drawing the ribs toward the pelvis.

Title: Partner plank
Desc: Hold a plank while a partner adds band resistance around the torso.

Title: Bench barbell rollout
Desc: Kneel in front of a bench and roll a barbell forward under control before returning.

Title: Barbell Side Bend
Desc: Stand tall with a barbell and bend laterally through a controlled range of motion.

Title: Advanced Kettlebell V
Desc: Perform a V-up pattern while holding a kettlebell for added resistance.

Title: Standing band anti-rotation press
Desc: Stand sideways to an anchored band and press forward while resisting trunk rotation.

Title: Seated band rotation
Desc: Sit tall and rotate the torso against light band resistance with a neutral spine.

Title: Dumbbell deadlift
Desc: Hinge at the hips with dumbbells and stand by driving through the floor.

Title: Supported glute bridge
Desc: Lie on your back with feet planted and lift hips while keeping ribs down.

Title: Low impact march
Desc: March in place at a comfortable cadence while maintaining posture.
